brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer (Day 8) with valid token-expiry reasoning; goes one level beyond the surface by explaining the silent refresh mechanism and noting the real-world PM vs. engineer disconnect; no explicit self-monitoring, bias-naming, or mid-analysis course correction; no counterfactual checks or re-derivation from a different angle are performed; acknowledges the PM/security contradiction implicitly signals uncertainty about real-world intent but offers no structured confidence analysis; notes the PM description as a contradicting alternative but does not evaluate whether 'continuous use' could extend token lifetime or other interpretations; the derivation chain (Day 1 login → 7-day refresh token → expires Day 8) is fully traceable and reproducible by a third party.
